name: Call-Site Migration

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Call-Site Migration is complete and correct

scope: Migrate all file-generation call sites from inline string construction to the template system. Create .tmpl files under internal/project/templates/ for each generated file, then replace strings.Builder/fmt.Sprintf/os.WriteFile chains at each call site with RenderToFile calls. Verify with snapshot tests that output is byte-for-byte identical before and after. Two sub-concerns: scaffold files (gitignore, READMEs) and artifact files (ADR, spec, audit-task, task markdown).

breadcrumbs.text: Orchestrator audit of call-site-migration. Two child nodes: scaffold-templates (complete, audit passed) and artifact-templates (complete, audit passed). Verified all 10 template deliverables exist on disk, all migrated call sites use RenderToFile/PromptRepository (adr_create.go, spec.go, project_create.go, task/add.go, scaffold_service.go). Build clean, go vet clean, all migration-relevant test packages pass. Only test failure is pre-existing flaky TestInitCmd_AlreadyInitialized in cmd/ package, unrelated to this migration. No gaps found.

audit.result_summary: Call-site migration completed across two child nodes. Scaffold-templates extracted 6 static template files (gitignore + 5 READMEs) from inline Go string literals in scaffold_service.go, reducing it by ~97 lines, and fixed a Reinit bug where base-tier README was lost after teardown. Artifact-templates created 4 Go templates (adr.md, spec.md, task.md, audit-task.md) and migrated all 4 generation call sites (adr_create.go, spec.go, project_create.go, task/add.go) from strings.Builder/fmt.Sprintf to PromptRepository.RenderToFile. Both nodes include snapshot tests verifying byte-for-byte output identity with the original inline construction. Build clean, go vet clean, all migration-relevant tests pass.
